calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Eugene Vlahos, Esq. for the Plaintiff: John B. Vlahos, also present in court.
Defendant: Maydean Henderson, present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for entry of Judgment for possession of the subject property.
Defendant agreed to vacate the property by Oct. 30, 2006 and Plaintiff will waived back-rent through Oct. 30, 2006 and dismissed the action with prejudice.
If Defendant failed to vacate, Plaintiff upon 24 hrs telephone notice to Defendant, and Ex Parte application to the Court for Judgment of possession, award for back-rent of $1,380.00, and 195.00 Costs.
Parties waived claims against each other.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment with attachment "A" & "B", signed by the parties, not filed.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED SEP-20-06: PLAINTIFF JOHN B. VLAHOS APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DATE; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT MS. MAYDEAN HENDERSON THIS DAY.

THE D-218 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR; D-206 TRIAL DATE REMAINS FOR MONDAY, SEP-25-06.

D-218; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA
